title: SensingFeedbackEvent
description: Generic event archetype for sensing feedback (Sensor → Controller). Emitted by a Sensor's Effector after observing an Actuator's ActuationEvent and verifying the mutation outcome. Carries structured verification: whether the mutation was confirmed, what was actually observed, and any deviations from expected state. The Controller's feedbackReceptor receives this event, populating the variable assigned to the sys.create/modify/delete/acquire return value — closing the homeostatic loop. This schema is the base contract for ActuationFeedbackEventSchema as referenced in GSM Sensing validation rules ('The feedback event archetype MUST be a subtype of ActuationFeedbackEventSchema'). SIE-seeded: one instance per SIE tenant, reused across all Sensings.

correlationId.description: Correlation identifier shared across the actuation chain. Same value as the originating ActuationControlEvent.correlationId, enabling end-to-end tracing from command through result to verification.

actuationType.description: The kind of state mutation that was verified. Echoed from the ActuationEvent.

stateObjectArchetype.description: Name of the StateObjectArchetype whose mutation was verified.

verified.description: Whether the Sensor's observation confirms the mutation took effect as intended. true: observed state matches expected post-mutation state. false: observed state deviates from expectations (see deviations).

observedState.description: Snapshot or projection of the state the Sensor actually observed after the mutation. For CREATION: the observed new instance properties. For MODIFICATION: the observed updated properties. For DELETION: null (instance should not exist) or observed residual state if deletion failed. For ACQUISITION: the observed read-only snapshot. Structure depends on the target StateObjectArchetype's schema.

property.description: Property path where deviation was detected (dot-separated for nested properties).

expected.description: The expected value based on the Actuation's writtenProperties and ActuationControlEvent.data.

observed.description: The actual value the Sensor observed.

deviationType.description: Classification of the deviation for automated governance analysis.

deviations.description: List of property-level deviations between expected and observed state. Empty array when verified=true. Enables side-effect detection (comparing Actuation.writtenProperties with observed mutations) and governance audit trail.

verificationLatency.description: ISO8601 duration between the ActuationEvent timestamp and this SensingFeedbackEvent timestamp. Measures how long verification took — useful for Coordination plane pacing and Supervision plane SLA monitoring.

actuationId.description: Reference to the GSM Actuation definition that was verified.

sensingId.description: Reference to the GSM Sensing definition linking the Actuation to its feedback observation.

sensorId.description: Reference to the Sensor mechanism that performed the observation.

ruleId.description: Reference to the GSM Rule whose body triggered the original actuation. Enables DPR lineage tracing: Operationalization → Rule → Actuation → Sensing → verified outcome.
